hero.subtitle: Free farming education for everyone. Learn, grow, and succeed!

product.title: Introducing SmartFarm System
product.description: Bringing smart farming to your doorstep. SmartFarm helps automate irrigation, monitor soil, and track your crops so you can grow healthier yields with less effort.

videos.title: Featured Videos
videos.subtitle: Selected tutorials to kickstart your farming journey!

interest.title: Interested in Our Gardening Automation?
interest.subtitle: Join the waitlist or get early access by filling out the form below!

product.title: SmartFarm
product.intro: Discover our range of smart farming hardware designed to make farming more efficient, sustainable, and easy to manage.

starter.title: Starter Package
starter.desc: Perfect for small gardens or new users. Includes essential smart farming hardware and basic training to get started.

growth.title: Growth Package
growth.desc: Best for growing farms with ongoing support. Includes everything in the Starter Package plus extended support and optimization services.

custom.title: Custom Package
custom.desc: Tailor-made for your farm size and needs. Build your package by selecting desired modules and services.

interest.title: Interested in SmartFarm Hardware?
interest.desc: You've selected a package! Fill out the form below to join the early access list or get a consultation for your chosen SmartFarm package!

about.heroSubtitle: Providing free, practical, and sustainable farming knowledge to all farmers and enthusiasts.
about.content: EduFarm is a free learning hub dedicated to helping farmers and enthusiasts gain practical farming knowledge. We provide step-by-step guides, interactive videos, and expert tips to make farming education accessible to everyone.

cards.missionDesc: Making sustainable farming knowledge free and easily accessible worldwide.
cards.offerDesc: Free tutorials, expert tips, and resources on modern farming practices.
cards.joinDesc: Join our growing community and share farming knowledge.

forum.heroSubtitle: A professional community where farmers, students, and innovators share knowledge, tips, and experiences to grow together.
forum.noPosts: No posts yet. Start a conversation!
